metadata.title: たみみなよろこべ
metadata.subtitle: Joy to the World — Japanese (Taishō-era translation)
metadata.composer: Lowell Mason (1792–1872), tune "Antioch" adapted from Handel's Messiah
metadata.lyricist: Isaac Watts (1674–1748), "Joy to the World" — Japanese translation by the editorial committee of 讃美歌 (1922)
metadata.x_pd_basis: Original lyrics by Watts (d. 1748) and tune by Mason (d. 1872) are PD by > 150 years. Japanese translation appears in 讃美歌 (1922) no. 58, edited by the 讃美歌委員 (hymnal committee) of the Meiji-Taishō era; > 100 years since publication and the committee members died well before 1955. Japanese Wikipedia quotes the text in full as PD-cleared
